prompt: Quero ver as fotos da pasta de Marco do By Rock. Me mostra as melhores pra eu escolher umas pra criativo de almoco.

assertions.name: folder-identified
assertions.description: Identified and navigated to the March folder (or similar monthly folder)

assertions.name: thumbnails-shown-base64
assertions.description: Showed base64 thumbnails of images from the selected folder

assertions.name: theme-aligned-recommendations
assertions.description: Recommendations are aligned with the 'almoco' (lunch) theme
